---
name: Bug report
about: Report unexpected behavior in CultureForge output or pipeline
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## CultureForge version
<!-- Date from inspect-report header (e.g., "2026-05-02") or git commit hash. Run `git rev-parse --short HEAD` if cloned from repo. -->

## Genome submitted
<!-- NCBI accession + organism name. If submitting a custom genome, describe it (source, completeness, MAG vs isolate). -->

## Command run
<!-- Full CLI invocation, e.g., `python3 cultureforge.py inspect 8 --section recipe --temperature 70` -->

## Expected behavior
<!-- What did you expect CultureForge to do? -->

## Actual behavior
<!-- What did it actually do? Paste the relevant output or error message. -->

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version:
- BLAST+ version:
- gapseq version (if applicable):
- GenomeSPOT version (if applicable):

## Additional context
<!-- Anything else: previous attempts, related observations, screenshots, etc. -->
